headline: Virginia Must Extend Deadline to Review Next Era-Dominion Merger
summary: The Virginia Distributed Alliance and Secure Solar Futures Urge Gov. Spanberger and the General Assembly to Allow 12 Months to Examine Complex Mega Merger and Ensure Adequate Protection for Ratepayers Logos of NextEra Energy and Dominion Energy The two companies have proposed a mega-merger that would create the largest electric utility company in the United States. headline: NextEra Energy (NEE) Pays $150 Million To Settle Political Interference Claims
summary: NextEra Energy subsidiary Florida Power and Light agreed to a $150 million settlement related to political interference allegations. The settlement arrives while NextEra Energy is pursuing a proposed $67 billion merger with Dominion Energy. The outcome may draw closer scrutiny from regulators reviewing the merger and from stakeholders focused on governance. NextEra Energy (NYSE:NEE), recently trading at $85.73, is confronting fresh legal and reputational pressure at the same time it is...
